examples: In my view, it is just as great an achievement to be a plumber or a bricklayer as it is to be a lawyer or a doctor.
He was a bricklayer – a big, strapping fellow.
A few minutes after, a Bricklayer passed by, carrying a pail full of plaster on his shoulder.
One job found him working outside as a bricklayer in the middle of a torrential storm.
Maier, a 31-year-old former bricklayer, is renowned for his ferocious competitive spirit and daredevil skiing.
